name: Lomi Lomi Salmon Spread
recipeIngredient: 3 oz package smoked salmon - cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, smoked salmon (in small pieces), lemon juice, and chopped onion.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Sprinkle with chopped green onions.
4. Serve with crackers or melba toast.
